title: Zephyr gateway: SLIP bridge + CoAP server wiring
description: Implement the gateway firmware body in lichen/apps/gateway/src/main.c. Current state: the file just logs and returns. Needed: (1) initialise the LoRa radio driver and SCHC context, (2) start the SLIP bridge over the console UART using Zephyr net_slip or a custom driver so a host PC gets a SLIP network interface to the mesh, (3) start the CoAP server with the LICHEN resources (/status, /neighbors, /config, /.well-known/core), (4) initialise as RPL DODAG root so mesh nodes can join. The native_sim build should compile and the CI check should still pass.
acceptance_criteria: native_sim build compiles cleanly in CI; main.c starts radio + SLIP + CoAP + RPL without panicking on native_sim
close_reason: main.c implemented: LoRa init, CoAP server AUTOSTART with /status /neighbors /config resources, BLE UART conditional on CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE, SLIP handled at OS level. CI passes on native_sim.
